title: Orchestration Lifetime Totals (v1)
description: Project-scoped cumulative per-backend delegation totals, accumulated across sessions by scripts/orchestration-rollup.sh. The rollup is idempotent per session_id (rolled_up_sessions) so completion + session-end + re-runs never double-count. Record-only; the scorecard reads this for the lifetime figure.

totals.description: Cumulative count of counted delegations per backend across all rolled-up sessions.

rolled_up_sessions.description: Session ids already folded into totals. Membership makes the rollup idempotent.

first_seen.description: UTC timestamp of the first rollup (ISO 8601). Null before any rollup.

last_seen.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent rollup (ISO 8601).
